problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: Combining Constructed wetland for water filtration with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Microbial community sequencing with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
